plugin.name: ThreeS_VikingAlerts
plugin.author: Joakim
plugin.description:
Fires a coloured note (and an optional bell) when something happens that you'd otherwise miss while doing other things: a trade cart comes back, a longship returns (island / Iron-Hull save / foreign tattoo / thralls), a raid returns with spoils, or a voyage reaches a node that needs resolving. The game lines still show as normal - this just adds the alert on top.
Commands valert show status valert on | off master on/off valert sound on | off bell on/off valert test fire a sample alert

trigger.match: The longship returned from the island
was saved from the deep by the Iron Hull perk
returned with a foreign tattoo pattern
A (hidden harbor|island|wreck|great discovery|unknown site) rises off

muclient.script:
local enabled = (GetVariable("va_on") ~= "0") local sound = (GetVariable("va_sound") ~= "0")
-- play the Windows "ding" only if the file exists (a missing path pops an error box) local function ding() local p = "C:\\Windows\\Media\\ding.wav" local f = io.open(p, "rb") if f then f:close(); Sound(p) end end
local COLOR = { cart = "#40C0FF", ship = "#60E060", raid = "#FFD040", voyage = "#E080E0" } local last_bell = 0
function va_alert(msg, cat) if not enabled then return end ColourNote(COLOR[cat] or "orange", "", " \187 [Viking] " .. tostring(msg)) if sound then local t = os.clock() if t - last_bell > 0.5 then last_bell = t; ding() end -- debounce overlapping triggers end end
-- fixed-message events function va_cart() va_alert("Cart returned from a trade route.", "cart") end function va_ship_island() va_alert("Longship returned from an island.", "ship") end function va_ship_ironhull() va_alert("Longship saved by the Iron Hull perk.", "ship") end function va_ship_tattoo() va_alert("Longship returned with a foreign tattoo.", "ship") end function va_ship_thralls() va_alert("Longship returned with thralls.", "ship") end function va_raid() va_alert("Raid returned with spoils.", "raid") end
-- wildcard events (wildcards passed safely as args, never injected into code) function va_voyage_node(name, line, wc) va_alert("Voyage: " .. ((wc and wc[1]) or "a node") .. " reached - resolve needed.", "voyage") end function va_voyage_msg(name, line, wc) va_alert("Voyage: " .. ((wc and wc[1]) or line or ""), "voyage") end
-- commands function va_set(key, on) SetVariable(key, on and "1" or "0") if key == "va_on" then enabled = on else sound = on end va_status() end
function va_status() ColourNote("orange", "", string.format("[Viking alerts] %s bell %s (valert on|off, valert sound on|off)", enabled and "ON" or "OFF", sound and "ON" or "OFF")) end
function OnPluginInstall() ColourNote("orange", "", "[Viking alerts] loaded - " .. (enabled and "ON" or "OFF") .. ", bell " .. (sound and "ON" or "OFF") .. ". Type 'valert' for options.") end
